---
title: "About"
toc: false
format-links: false
---

I'm Josh Rosenberg, Haslam Family Professor and Associate Professor of STEM Education at the University of Tennessee, Knoxville. I study the use of data in education, especially in STEM education.

My research is in two closely related areas. In *educational data science*, I use new data sources and computational methods to study teaching, learning, and educational systems. In *data science education*, I study how students and educators learn to work with data themselves. Much of this work happens in collaboration with teachers, students, and community partners, in real classrooms and schools.

I have received more than $9 million in research funding as principal investigator or co-principal investigator, including a National Science Foundation CAREER Award. I have published more than 65 peer-reviewed journal articles in outlets including *Educational Researcher*, *Journal of Research in Science Teaching*, and *AERA Open*, and my work has been cited more than 7,000 times. I'm also a co-author of [*Data Science in Education Using R*](https://datascienceineducation.com/) (Routledge), a book with an open-access, web-based version accessed more than 150,000 times.

At UT, I teach courses in educational data science, STEM education, and research methods. I serve as an Associate Editor of the *Journal of Statistics and Data Science Education* and on the editorial boards of several education research journals, and I served as a committee member for the National Academies study *Developing Competencies for the Future of Data and Computing: The Role of K-12*.

## Curriculum Vitae

For a full record of publications, grants, teaching, and service:

[View My CV](vita.html){.btn .btn-primary .me-2 .mb-2} [Download CV (PDF)](/vita.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .mb-2}

## Personal

I'm a parent and community member passionate about both work and family. My favorite activities include running, hiking, biking, and camping and backpacking with my family. With my wife, Katie, I wrote [*Hiking Knoxville*](https://familyhikesaroundknox.com/), a family-friendly guide to hikes around Knoxville, East Tennessee, and the Smokies.

![](images/IMG_7163.jpeg){fig-alt="Josh Rosenberg" fig-align="center" width="600"}

## Contact

For research collaborations, student inquiries, speaking invitations, or media requests, please [reach out](contact.qmd) — email is best.
